creator: ggg_mail@inbox.ru
text:
Hello Tadaaki,
 
 Indeed, in my $PATH I have /usr/local/bin before /usr/bin - that is done because I have CUPS installed on that host and it installs lpd, lpr, lp etc binaries in /usr/local/bin and they must supersede system binaries with the same names from /usr/bin/. An d I do have devel/binutils installed.
 
 Thank you for the hints - I'll try them as soon as I will get to that machine.
 
 Still, I wonder what is the reason of this and how it should be fixed for sure. The question is: why do utils from ports produce binary incompatible results? I think this should be filed as a bug as well.
